text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is injured during training, so I
escort her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My sincerest apologies. My negligence has
caused you concern.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that my treatment is finished, let's get back
to training.
choice_data_list: You want to run straight away?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Of course. It doesn't hurt, so there should be no
issue.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Besides, this kind of injury is commonplace in the
martial arts world.
choice_data_list: Take the rest of the day off just to be safe.
We can train, but let's take things easy.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
With all due respect, I don't believe that an injury
of this nature warrants rest.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to fall behind. Please allow me to
continue training.
choice_data_list:
Carelessness is a foe to be feared. We can make
up the time once you're back on your feet.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Haste does make waste. In the martial arts world,
it's commonplace to hear of injuries caused by
overexertion.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I understand. If you insist, I'll rest up and focus my
energy on recovering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki sounds slightly disappointed as she
sets off back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for understanding. Shall we head to
the track?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I test the waters by assigning her a light run, but
Yaeno Muteki soon looks pained.
choice_data_list: I was worried this would happen. Let's stop.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Understood. I'll focus on recovering for now.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I deeply apologize for dragging you out to the
track...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki sounds remorseful as she heads
back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Whew... A lighter training session should be fine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You needn't be concerned. I'll limit my efforts as
a matter of course.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I take pride in having the resolve to weather
injuries of this caliber.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki completes a light training session
while taking care not to aggravate her injury.
